meta.dealName: Medidata Solutions — Clinical Trial Data Integration Platform

hubspot.note: Tagged as a strategic target account (flagship life-sciences logo) — not yet a customer on any product line.

meddpiccNotes.metrics: VP Clinical Development quantified expected 30% reduction in data-reconciliation time across trial sites.
meddpiccNotes.economicBuyer: Chief Medical Officer confirmed as budget owner in the 2026-04-02 proposal review call.
meddpiccNotes.decisionCriteria: 21 CFR Part 11 compliance, integration with existing EDC/CTMS stack, annual contract preferred.
meddpiccNotes.decisionProcess: CMO approves directly for spend under $100k; confirmed in notes.
meddpiccNotes.paperProcess: IT security review completed 2026-04-20, no issues flagged.
meddpiccNotes.identifyPain: Recurring data-reconciliation delays across multi-site trials, cited in an internal ops review the VP referenced.
meddpiccNotes.champion: VP Clinical Development led technical evaluation, gave strong internal endorsement per CMO.
meddpiccNotes.competition: Veeva Vault CTMS named as an existing platform being evaluated for expansion instead of a net-new purchase.

activityTimeline.summary: Technical deep-dive, VP gave strong internal endorsement.
Proposal review; CMO confirms budget authority and decision process.
IT security review completed, no blockers.
Negotiation call — CMO asks for a longer evaluation period before committing. No further contact after.

emails.subject: Re: Security review — Clinical Trial Data Integration Platform
emails.snippet: Security review complete on our end, no concerns. Passing back to the clinical team for next steps.

emails.subject: Re: Contract terms
emails.snippet: Everything looks solid on our end. We'd like a bit more runway to finish evaluating before signing — will circle back.

proposal.summary: Proposal accepted in principle during 2026-04-02 call; no pricing or scope objections raised at any point.
proposal.scopeSummary: Full trial data integration suite, EDC/CTMS connectors, annual contract.
